videos.title: HTML Form Attributes - Web Dev Simplified
videos.description: Comprehensive guide to HTML form attributes including action, method, autocomplete, novalidate, and target.

videos.title: Form Attributes Explained - freeCodeCamp
videos.description: Understand all form attributes and how they control form behavior, submission, and validation.

videos.title: Input Attributes Tutorial - Traversy Media
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers input attributes like placeholder, required, disabled, readonly, maxlength, and pattern.

videos.title: Form Validation Attributes - Kevin Powell
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains HTML5 form validation attributes and how to provide user-friendly error messages.

videos.title: HTML5 Form Features - Google Chrome Developers
videos.description: Explore modern HTML5 form attributes and features for better user experience and input handling.
